subject: Chitonga
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: MISYOBO IMBI YABWAAPAUZI.
topics: a. Tusimpi/ Twaambyo/ Tusimyo –ntwaambo twabusongo tujisi lulayo lwakansiya-
b. Tulabi – ntwaambo tuyanda bwiinguzi bwabusongo. Tulakonzya kubelesyegwa
c. Nyimbo –majwi aakutembaula, kwaambilila, kulumbaizya, kuyumya-yumya
